title: The Moon Is An Alien Spaceship (Ft. Randall Carlson)
summary: Jesse Michels interviews Randall Carlson about anomalies surrounding the Moon, including its unusual density, structure, and orbital characteristics that suggest it may have been geoengineered. The conversation explores connections between ancient civilizations like Atlantis, the Younger Dryas cataclysm, and the possibility that survivors of an advanced prehistoric civilization may have established bases on the Moon.

acronyms.definition: US government agency responsible for space exploration and aeronautics research

events.description: New catastrophist theories about comets originated in the British Isles
Comet Shoemaker-Levy 9 impacted Jupiter in July
Jesse Michels and Randall Carlson first met

key_claims.claim: The Moon is much less dense than Earth (slightly more than half as dense) yet has sufficient mass that it should have deformed into a sphere but hasn't
The Moon has two moments of inertia which creates a 1:1 spin-orbit coupling with Earth
Apollo seismometers showed the Moon has a vibrational train 10 times or more longer than Earth after impacts
The Moon contains uranium-236, chromium, and titanium which are rare high refractory metals
The Sun is 400 times larger than the Moon and 400 times farther away
Gordon McDonald stated the only way the Moon makes sense is if it's hollow
Plato's date for Atlantis (9,600 BC) precisely matches the end of the Younger Dryas and Meltwater Pulse 1B
There is overwhelming evidence of major subsidence on the floor of the Atlantic Ocean along the Mid-Atlantic ridge
The infall of meteorites into the Sun can trigger solar outbursts and coronal mass ejections
A gigantic comet (50-60 mile diameter) was captured into a sub-Jovian orbit around 25-30,000 years ago, creating the Taurid meteor stream
Randall Carlson is willing to consider that the Moon has been geoengineered by an advanced civilization
